---
name: 🚀 Feature & Capability Request
about: Propose a brand new calculation module or systemic advancement.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "feature-request"]
---

## 🎯 Target Capability
Is your feature request related to a current structural limitation? Please describe it cleanly.

## 🔮 Proposed Engineering Solution
Describe the mathematical behavior or algorithmic implementation you want added to the core stack.

## 💎 Alternative Solutions Evaluated
List any fallback implementations or patterns you considered to keep the engine zero-dependency.

## 📝 Additional Architectural Context
Add any extra technical specs, formulas, or documentation references here.
